rows.notes: Top-centre title is legible but spelling uncertain (reads 'Solata'); no amounts present. Vertical ruling lines not needed for this header.
Clear centred ledger heading beneath title. No monetary figures. Handwriting for 'Dno Rectori Schol: & Officiarius' is reasonably clear.

rows.description: Mts ad Est Nature & Officiar. P.295
rows.notes: Description and page no. readable. Pound/shilling/pence columns aligned against vertical rules; reads as 20 pounds, 6 shillings, 8 pence. Columns unambiguous here.

Description legible. Amount reads '27' in pounds column with blank shillings/pence — interpreted as 27.0.0. Minor uncertainty because shillings/pence are blank rather than marked '0', but column alignment is clear.
Description and page number readable. Pounds column clearly '30' with blanks in shillings/pence — taken as 30.0.0. Handwriting of description slightly slanted but unambiguous.

Description readable but smaller. Amount appears to read '3' in pounds and '4' in shillings (the shilling figure is a little compressed and could be '14' if misaligned). Chosen as 3 pounds 4 shillings 0 pence based on alignment with the pounds/shillings ruling; validation (shillings <20) satisfied. Moderate ambiguity due to tight handwriting.
Short description 'Dno Rectori' is clear. Amount aligned and reads 30 pounds, 9 shillings, 2 pence. This '30.9.2' appears repeatedly as a standard line and is written clearly.
Description (Merton David ...) and page number 301 legible. Amount clearly '77.9.10' with consistent alignment to columns; digits are distinct.
Abbreviated description ('Do Do ...') with page 302. Amount matches the previous 77.9.10 and is written clearly in the pounds/shillings/pence columns.
Description and page no. readable. Amount reads as 34 pounds, 13 shillings, 4 pence; shillings and pence digits are a bit small but column alignment supports this reading.
Place name and page 304 readable as 'Kidlington Augment ...'. Amount aligns to read 13.17.3; digits clear though the long descending tail of the '7' required checking alignment with ruling lines.
Repeating 'Dno Rectori ut supra' phrase. Amount again clearly 30.9.2, alignment and handwriting crisp here.

Description partly abbreviated and slightly smudged ('S. Bath' uncertain). Amount appears to be '19' in the pounds column with blanks for shillings/pence; chosen as 19.0.0 but there is moderate uncertainty because the shillings column contains a faint mark that could be another digit.
Short description 'Do Mr Chiefs' (abbreviation 'Do' for 'Ditto'). Pounds column reads '30' clearly; shillings/pence blank and interpreted as zero.

rows.description: Augment: of Commons Do moderate & subdec 310
rows.notes: Description is longer and slightly cramped. Amount appears as '50.8.' (50 pounds, 8 shillings). Pence column blank. Moderate confidence due to script tightness; shillings digit is readable as '8'.
Description and page 311 legible. Amount reads clearly as 11 pounds, 12 shillings, 5 pence; digits align well with ruling lines.
Again the repeated 'Dno Rectori ut supra'. Amount 30.9.2 is written clearly and consistently with earlier occurrences.
Description reads like 'Sumner Stipend' (first word uncertain: 'Sumner' vs 'Sowner'); amount appears as 25 pounds 10 shillings. Shillings digit clear; description ambiguity lowers confidence.
Description interpreted as 'W.H. & parson Corn Rent' (hand is compact; could be 'W.H. & parn. Corn Rent'). Amount reads as 35.1.7; digits are present but the text ambiguity reduces confidence.
Final occurrence of 'Dno Rectori' above the page total. Amount again clearly 30.9.2; alignment and repetition support high confidence.
Large final total written at right as '661.5.7'. Figures are bold and aligned to the pounds/shillings/pence columns; clear reading with good contrast.
